abort.no_compatible_transmitters: No radio frequency transmitter supports 433.92 MHz OOK transmissions. Please add a compatible transmitter first.
abort.no_transmitters: No radio frequency transmitters are available. Please set up a transmitter first.

test_failed.description: Could not send the test command for code {code}. Check that your radio frequency transmitter is online, then press Retry.
test_failed.title: Test failed

test_light.description: Toggled the hood light on and off using code {code}. Did you see it react? Press Finish to save, or Retry to pick a different code.
test_light.title: Verify the code

data_description.code: The code your hood is paired with (1-10). Code 1 is the factory default.
data_description.transmitter: The radio frequency transmitter used to control the Novy cooker hood.

user.description: After you submit, Home Assistant will toggle the hood light on and off to verify the code works.
